2. Launch the app.
3. Minimize the app",,When user open the app again from background mode he/she should be on same tutorial screen on which he has send the screen to background mode.,,,,

2. Launch the app.

2. Launch the app.
3. Tutorial screen.",,If tutorial screen si cyclic then there should be time frame of minimum 2 seconds so that user can read the content of slides.,,,,

2. Launch the app.
3. Tutorial screen.",,If user abrubt the cycles manually then time frame should disable and screen should be slide-able manually.,,,,
